search_parameters.q: What are the main academic programs offered at Kumaraguru College of Technology in India (Coimbatore)? List the undergraduate, postgraduate, and PhD programs available.

text_blocks.snippet: Kumaraguru College of Technology (KCT) in Coimbatore offers a wide range of academic programs at the undergraduate (UG), postgraduate (PG), and doctoral (PhD) levels, primarily focused on engineering, technology, and management.

KCT offers 4-year B.E. and B.Tech degrees across 14 specializations. These include Aeronautical, Automobile, Civil, CSE, EEE, ECE, EIE, Mechanical, and Mechatronics Engineering, along with Biotechnology, Fashion Tech, IT, and Textile Tech.
The college provides 2-year specialized PG degrees:

list.snippet: M.E./M.Tech: Structural Engineering, Environmental Engineering, Construction Management, Industrial Engineering, Embedded Systems, VLSI Design, Biotechnology, Data Science, Defence Tech, and Technical Textile.
MBA & MCA: MBA (General, Project Management, Logistics & Supply Chain, Innovation/Entrepreneurship) and Master of Computer Applications.

text_blocks.snippet: KCT supports research in 11+ fields, including Biotechnology, Civil, CSE, EEE, ECE, Fashion, Mechanical, Textile Technology, Chemistry, Math, Physics, and Management Studies.
Would you like more information on the admission process or entrance exams required for any of these specific programs?

reconstructed_markdown:
Kumaraguru College of Technology \(KCT\) in Coimbatore offers a wide range of academic programs at the undergraduate \(UG\), postgraduate \(PG\), and doctoral \(PhD\) levels, primarily focused on engineering, technology, and management. [0] [7] [4]

### Undergraduate Programs \(B.E. / B.Tech\)

KCT offers 4\-year B.E. and B.Tech degrees across 14 specializations. These include Aeronautical, Automobile, Civil, CSE, EEE, ECE, EIE, Mechanical, and Mechatronics Engineering, along with Biotechnology, Fashion Tech, IT, and Textile Tech. [0] [2] [1] [3] [8]

### Postgraduate Programs \(M.E. / M.Tech / MBA / MCA\)

The college provides 2\-year specialized PG degrees: [0] [1]

- M.E./M.Tech: Structural Engineering, Environmental Engineering, Construction Management, Industrial Engineering, Embedded Systems, VLSI Design, Biotechnology, Data Science, Defence Tech, and Technical Textile.
- MBA & MCA: MBA \(General, Project Management, Logistics & Supply Chain, Innovation/Entrepreneurship\) and Master of Computer Applications.

### Doctoral Programs \(PhD\)

KCT supports research in 11\+ fields, including Biotechnology, Civil, CSE, EEE, ECE, Fashion, Mechanical, Textile Technology, Chemistry, Math, Physics, and Management Studies. [0] [3] [5] [6]

Would you like more information on the admission process or entrance exams required for any of these specific programs?
